news_title: Catheter Precision, Inc. Announces Two New Patents to be Issued by USPTO
summary: Catheter Precision (NYSE:VTAK), a medical device company specializing in cardiac electrophysiology, has received approval fortwo new patentsfrom the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO).The first patent, "Methods of Ventricular Arrhythmia Localization Using a 3D Model," will be assigned toKardionav, a joint venture between Catheter Precision and physicians. The second patent, "Neurostimulation Devices and Methods," focused on improving cardiac ventricular function in heart failure patients, will be assigned toCardionomix, a majority-owned subsidiary of Catheter Precision.
